body_txt: And then there are these robots. As the trope name implies, they're made of scrap metal or otherwise relatively cheap materials. Naturally, this means they'll be more fragile than conventional Humongous Mecha , and depending on the setting, they are either Joke Characters or simply low-tiered, yet there can be events that lead to them being surprisingly more valuable than one would assume a robot of their make to be. If they have any kind of armaments, expect welding-torch flamethrowers , rusty rivet guns , buzzsaw blades , and other scrapyard tools reimagined or repurposed as improvised weapons. Can be literal cases of What a Piece of Junk , because they usually literally are . Subtrope of Franken-vehicle . Good Old Robot and Homemade Inventions are closely related to this trope. Especially functional examples may qualify as Sufficiently Advanced Bamboo Technology .
